tasks.subject: Task 0: Add parseNameStatusZ to gitParsing.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Centralize parsing of `git diff --name-status -z` output as a tested pure function.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/services/gitParsing.ts`
- Test: `src/test/workingTreeDiff.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run compile && node --test dist/test/workingTreeDiff.test.js`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/services/gitParsing.ts","src/test/workingTreeDiff.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run compile && node --test dist/test/workingTreeDiff.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["parses NUL-separated name-status output","handles renames/copies returning new path","empty input returns empty array"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Add GitService.getFilesChangedBetweenWorkingTreeAndRef and resolveRevisionToCommit
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Service methods for folder-mode list assembly and picker SHA resolution.

**Files:** `src/types.ts`, `src/services/gitService.ts`, `src/test/workingTreeDiff.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run compile && node --test dist/test/workingTreeDiff.test.js`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/types.ts","src/services/gitService.ts","src/test/workingTreeDiff.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run compile && node --test dist/test/workingTreeDiff.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["working-tree diff lists tracked + untracked","scopePath restricts results","resolveRevisionToCommit returns undefined on failure"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Implement revision picker (src/views/revisionPicker.ts)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Sectioned QuickPick (local/remote/tag) plus dynamic SHA-prefix lookup.

**Files:** `src/views/revisionPicker.ts`, `src/test/revisionPicker.test.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run compile && node --test dist/test/revisionPicker.test.js`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/views/revisionPicker.ts","src/test/revisionPicker.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run compile && node --test dist/test/revisionPicker.test.js","acceptanceCriteria":["isLikelyShaPrefix matches hex 4-40","buildRevisionPickerItems sectioned correctly","pickRevisionToCompare resolves synthetic commit"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Add 'workingTreeCompare' mode to CommitFilesTreeProvider
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New tree-item class + ActiveTreeState variant + showWorkingTreeComparison method.

**Files:** `src/providers/commitFilesTreeProvider.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run check-types && npm run compile && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/providers/commitFilesTreeProvider.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run check-types && npm run compile && npm run lint","acceptanceCriteria":["new tree item class with preview-diff command","third ActiveTreeState variant","getChildren routes new mode","existing tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Add EditorOrchestrator entry points
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `openWorkingTreeFileDiff` (live file:// right-side, fallback for deleted), `openCompareWithRevisionForFile`, `openCompareWithRevisionForFolder`.

**Files:** `src/editor/editorOrchestrator.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run check-types && npm run compile && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/editor/editorOrchestrator.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run check-types && npm run compile && npm run lint","acceptanceCriteria":["openWorkingTreeFileDiff handles deleted files","folder mode populates view + opens first preview","empty diff shows info message"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Register intelliGit.compareWithRevision and per-item file-diff command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the Explorer command and the working-tree-compare file-click command.

**Files:** `src/commands/commandController.ts`

**Verify:** `npm run check-types && npm run compile && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files":["src/commands/commandController.ts"],"verifyCommand":"npm run check-types && npm run compile && npm run lint","acceptanceCriteria":["new explorer command registered","preview-diff click command registered","error toast for non-repo target"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Add manifest entries for the new command
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Surface the command in `explorer/context` and hide internals from the palette.

**Files:** `package.json`

**Verify:** `npm run check-types && npm run bundle`

```json:metadata
{"files":["package.json"],"verifyCommand":"npm run check-types && npm run bundle","acceptanceCriteria":["explorer context entry added","internal command hidden from palette","manifest builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Documentation (README, CHANGELOG)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the feature for end users.

**Files:** `README.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`

**Verify:** Manual review.

```json:metadata
{"files":["README.md","CHANGELOG.md"],"verifyCommand":"git diff README.md CHANGELOG.md","acceptanceCriteria":["README documents new action","CHANGELOG entry added"]}
```
